case_title: KERR ROBERT CARE OF HANNON DAVID VS CLARKSON JIM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY KERR ROBERT CARE OF HANNON DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKSON JIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
